proven.claim: When `fileIssue` throws, the `catch` block logs an error and increments `errors`.
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 168
; When `fileIssue` throws, the `catch` block logs an error and increments `errors`.
; Prove that if an exception occurs, `errors` must be incremented.
(declare-const errors_before Int)
(declare-const errors_after Int)
(declare-const filing_throws Bool)

; pre‑condition: an exception is thrown
(assert (= filing_throws true))
; transition: error branch increments `errors`
(assert (= errors_after (+ errors_before 1)))

; negated property: errors stay the same despite the exception
(assert (not (= errors_after (+ errors_before 1))))

(check-sat)
